sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Kickle Cubicle
notes: T3 data tier (empirical/qualitative). Sources document game structure, composer, and developer information but do not contain documented music tempo, key signatures, chord progressions, or specific SFX characteristics. A hidden sound test exists in-game (accessible via A+B on Controller 2 at title screen + Reset) but test results are not documented in provided sources.
